narrative:
Tuscarawas 2 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,157 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
